title: Marshall wrapped a speaker in crushed purple velvet to celebrate Hendrix.
summary: Its $299.99 Acton III Bluetooth speaker is now dramatically more groovy to celebrate the brand’s 60 year anniversary of working with the musician . If you buy something from a Verge link, Vox Media may earn a commission.
